name: Peoples Special Transportation
recent_news: BBB profile indicates business is out of business; NC incorporation 3/29/2006 with Joseph Dorbor as owner/principal; classified as Transportation for the Disabled.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Appears defunct/out of business per BBB; was a sole-proprietor NEMT van service (not a school bus operator). No tuck-in value.

name: Urmi Transportation
districts_or_customers: Simi Valley area NEMT clients (elderly/wheelchair/medical appointments)
recent_news: Urmi Transport, Inc. incorporated in CA on 8/27/2021 with Angeles Perez as registered agent; family-owned (name derived from children's names URI + MITZI); origin as shoe store in 2003, pivoted to NEMT.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Micro family-owned NEMT/wheelchair service serving elderly and medical clients in Simi Valley. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in (no school district contracts, no SPED bus fleet).

name: Transportation Extraordinaire
recent_news: No corroborating web presence found for 'Transportation Extraordinaire' at 149 E Main St, Bradford NH 03221. Note: Student Transportation of America (STA) operates a separate Bradford NH facility (subject of a 2024 explosion/fire investigation) — unrelated to this listing. Other Bradford-area operator identified is Valley Transportation Inc (est. 1973), also unrelated.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Single-employee, ~$70K revenue micro-operator with no verifiable web footprint. Even if active, scale is far below Summit tuck-in threshold; the larger Bradford NH school bus operator is STA (already a strategic competitor, not a target).

name: A-1 Transportation Svc
recent_news: No corroborating web presence found for A-1 Transportation Svc at 718 N Howell St, Davenport IA. Davenport Community School District busing is handled by All Town Transportation (Alltown Bus Services), not A-1.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Single-employee, $58K revenue micro-operator with no verifiable digital presence. Not the Davenport school bus contractor (that's Alltown). Out of scope for Summit.

name: Waytogo Wheelchair Transport
districts_or_customers: Central Oregon NEMT clients (Bend/Deschutes County); listed as a resource provider by Stroke Awareness Oregon
recent_news: Family-owned and operated full-service wheelchair transportation company; founded 2010; D&B reports 2 employees and ~$133K annual revenue. Owner Bill Brown.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Bend OR family-owned wheelchair/NEMT micro-operator, not a school-bus or SPED contractor. No school district relationships identified; scale below tuck-in threshold.
